positive: A highly detailed, clean silhouette of a stylized celestial creature, resembling a griffin mixed with nebula gas clouds, soaring over a minimalist, cosmic landscape. The creature should possess sharp, elegant curves and an ethereal glow, transitioning between deep indigo, vibrant magenta, and cosmic gold. Use strong, high-contrast linework with areas of negative space for print contrast. Composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for a central apparel graphic. The art style should be a blend of Neo-Art Nouveau and modern scientific illustration, emphasizing deep blacks and luminous highlights. Minimal background clutter.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low contrast, signature, text, logo, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad composition, amateur, realistic photography, noisy, artifacts, dirty, messy, distracting elements
